Insights & Education

The Psychiatry & TMS Blog

Evidence-based articles on brain stimulation therapy, psychiatric care, and mental wellness — written by Dr. Ritesh Amin and his clinical team.

Featured Articles

TMS Therapy · 4 min read

Understanding TMS Therapy: How Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation Works

A deep dive into the science behind TMS — how magnetic pulses target specific areas of the brain, what to expect during a session, and why it is effective for treatment-resistant depression.

Read Article → April 15, 2026
Treatment Options · 4 min read

Spravato vs. TMS: Which Treatment Is Right for You?

Both Spravato and TMS are FDA-approved breakthrough treatments for treatment-resistant depression. Here is how they compare — from mechanism of action to side effects to treatment timelines.

Read Article → March 28, 2026

Depression · 4 min

5 Signs You May Have Treatment-Resistant Depression

If you have tried multiple medications without adequate relief, you are not alone — and you are not out of options. Learn the key indicators of treatment-resistant depression and what evidence-based treatments exist.

Read → March 10, 2026
Patient Guide · 4 min

What to Expect During Your First TMS Session

Curious about trying TMS but not sure what happens on day one? We walk you through every step — from the consultation and mapping process to what the actual stimulation feels like.

Read → February 20, 2026
Ketamine · 4 min

Ketamine Infusion Therapy: Breaking Down the Science

Ketamine has been used as an anesthetic for decades. Discover how low-dose ketamine infusions are now transforming outcomes for severe depression, PTSD, and chronic pain conditions.

Read → February 5, 2026
PTSD · 4 min

PTSD and the Brain: How Neuromodulation Offers New Hope

Post-traumatic stress disorder reshapes neural circuits in measurable ways. Learn how targeted brain stimulation is showing remarkable results for patients who have exhausted traditional therapies.

Read → January 18, 2026
Insurance · 4 min

Insurance Coverage for TMS Therapy: What You Need to Know

Most major insurance plans cover TMS therapy for treatment-resistant depression. Learn what criteria insurers typically require and how our team helps navigate the prior authorization process.

Read → January 5, 2026
Neurology · 4 min

The Role of Neuromodulation in Treating Chronic Migraine

For patients suffering from chronic migraine who have tried prophylactic medications with limited success, TMS offers a non-invasive, non-pharmacological alternative backed by FDA clearance.

Read → December 10, 2025

Stay Informed

Get evidence-based articles on psychiatric treatments, TMS research, and mental wellness — delivered to your inbox. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.

Providing advanced, compassionate care and innovative TMS therapy for individuals in New Jersey seeking profound mental wellness.

Emergency: If you are experiencing a medical crisis, call 911 or visit the nearest emergency room.
